nasb.text: And He answered and said to them, “Why do you yourselves transgress the commandment of God for the sake of your tradition?

esv.text: He answered them, “And why do you break the commandment of God for the sake of your tradition?

cnv.text: 耶穌回答：“你們又為甚麼因你們的傳統，違背　神的誡命呢？

ccb.text: 耶稣回答说：“为什么你们拘守传统而违背上帝的诫命呢？

csbs.text: 耶稣回答他们，说：“你们为什么为了你们的传统而违犯神的命令呢？
